nasb.text: saying that the Son of Man must be delivered into the hands of sinful men, and be crucified, and the third day rise again.”

esv.text: that the Son of Man must be delivered into the hands of sinful men and be crucified and on the third day rise.”

cnv.text: 說：‘人子必須被交在罪人手裡，釘在十字架上，第三日復活。’”

ccb.text: ‘人子必须被交在罪人的手中，被钉在十字架上，在第三天复活。’”

csbs.text: 说‘人子必须被交在罪人手中，被钉十字架，然后在第三天复活。’”
